response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a polyglot full-stack developer whose career has been overwhelmingly focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and web technologies. His C++ exposure is limited to roughly six months at National Instruments (2014–2015) and a bachelor thesis project — far short of the mandatory 5–10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows. He has no demonstrable Fixed Income, capital markets, or investment banking domain knowledge; his brief stint at RIDE Capital involved Node/TypeScript/GraphQL for retail investment tooling, not capital-markets systems. SQL Server and Oracle are not mentioned anywhere in the resume. The role's mandatory requirements are almost entirely unmet.
strengths: Demonstrated CI/CD and DevOps culture (GitLab, Docker, trunk-based development) across multiple roles
Broad polyglot background (D, Java, C#, C/C++, TypeScript) shows genuine adaptability to different runtimes
Some adjacent financial-services exposure through RIDE Capital, indicating comfort in regulated-industry environments
concerns: C++ experience is approximately 6 months total (NI LabWindows, 2014–2015) versus the mandatory 5–10 years on Windows
Zero Fixed Income, Fixed Income Derivatives, or capital-markets domain knowledge anywhere in the resume
No mention of SQL Server or Oracle; SQL is listed only generically in the skills section with no depth evidence

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
